122typedef struct _transform {
124 media_t media;
125
133 int (*query_stream_dependencies)(const struct _transform *self, const char *name, const strings_t **dependencies);
134
143 int (*query_compatible_stream_caps)(const struct _transform *self, const char *name,
144 const char *dependent_stream_name, const capabilities_t *dependent_stream_caps,
145 capabilities_t **compatible_caps);
146
147 // Private members
161 int (*do_process_stream)(const struct _transform *self, const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers);
162
163} transform_t;
164
184static inline int transform_initialize(transform_t *self) {
185 media_t *media = (media_t *)self;
186 return media_initialize(media);
187}
188
211static inline int transform_release(transform_t *self) {
212 media_t *media = (media_t *)self;
213 return media_release(media);
214}
215
245static inline int transform_prepare(transform_t *self) {
246 media_t *media = (media_t *)self;
247 return media_prepare(media);
248}
249
275static inline int transform_finalize(transform_t *self) {
276 media_t *media = (media_t *)self;
277 return media_finalize(media);
278}
279
296static inline int transform_get_state(const transform_t *self, media_state_t *state) {
297 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
298 if ((self != NULL) && (state != NULL)) {
299 ret = media_get_state((const media_t *)self, state);
300 }
301 return ret;
302}
303
316static inline void transform_get_version(const transform_t *self, uint32_t *major, uint32_t *minor, uint32_t *patch) {
317 (void)self;
318 *major = TRANSFORM_C_VERSION_MAJOR;
319 *minor = TRANSFORM_C_VERSION_MINOR;
320 *patch = TRANSFORM_C_VERSION_PATCH;
321}
322
343static inline int transform_get_streams(const transform_t *self, const streams_t **streams) {
344 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
345 return media_get_streams(media, streams);
346}
347
365static inline int transform_get_stream_capabilities(const transform_t *self, const char *const name,
366 const capabilities_t **caps) {
367 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
368 return media_get_stream_capabilities(media, name, caps);
369}
370
390static inline int transform_set_stream_capabilities(const transform_t *self, const char *const name,
391 const capabilities_t *caps) {
392 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
393 return media_set_stream_capabilities(media, name, caps);
394}
395
416static inline int transform_get_controls(const transform_t *self, const controls_t **controls) {
417 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
418 return media_get_controls(media, controls);
419}
420
442static inline int transform_get_control(const transform_t *self, const char *const name, value_t *value) {
443 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
444 return media_get_control(media, name, value);
445}
446
477static inline int transform_set_control(const transform_t *self, const char *name, const value_t value) {
478 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
479 return media_set_control(media, name, value);
480}
481
500static inline int transform_about(const transform_t *self, const properties_t **properties) {
501 const media_t *media = (const media_t *)self;
502 return media_about(media, properties);
503}
504
523static inline int transform_process_stream(const transform_t *self, const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers) {
524 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
525 if ((self != NULL) && (stream_buffers != NULL)) {
526 if (self->do_process_stream == NULL) {
527 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
528 } else {
529 ret = self->do_process_stream(self, stream_buffers);
530 }
531 }
532 return ret;
533}
534
557static inline int transform_query_stream_dependencies(const transform_t *self, const char *name,
558 const strings_t **dependencies) {
559 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
560 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (dependencies != NULL)) {
561 if (self->query_stream_dependencies == NULL) {
562 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
563 } else {
564 ret = self->query_stream_dependencies(self, name, dependencies);
565 }
566 }
567 return ret;
568}
569
594static inline int transform_query_compatible_stream_caps(const transform_t *self, const char *name,
595 const char *dependent_stream_name,
596 const capabilities_t *dependent_stream_caps,
597 capabilities_t **compatible_caps) {
598 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
599 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (dependent_stream_name != NULL) && (dependent_stream_caps != NULL) &&
600 (compatible_caps != NULL)) {
601 if (self->query_compatible_stream_caps == NULL) {
602 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
603 } else {
604 ret = self->query_compatible_stream_caps(self, name, dependent_stream_name, dependent_stream_caps,
605 compatible_caps);
606 }
607 }
608 return ret;
609}
610
626static inline void transform_inspect(const transform_t *self, int (*print_func)(const char *, ...)) {
627 media_inspect((const media_t *)self, print_func);
628}
629
630#ifdef __cplusplus
631}
632#endif

634#endif // TRANSFORM_C_H_
_transform
Transform C API handle, extending the base media handle.
